findings.recommended_fix: Remove all user rankings; replace with Focus Rooms or collective milestones

findings.issue: CRYSTAL LAW 6 AMENDMENT incomplete — cuts off mid-sentence, leaving rule undefined. Violates Law 11: DOCUMENTATION TRUTH.
findings.recommended_fix: Recover full amendment from version control or meeting logs. Enforce doc completeness via pre-commit hook.

findings.issue: Leaderboard removal noted in comment but still present in law — Crystal Law 5 says '❌ Leaderboards of any kind' yet implementation status unverified. Violates Law 5: ONE PRIMARY ACTION and Crystal Law 5.
findings.recommended_fix: Audit UI for leaderboards, remove all, add automated scan for 'leaderboard' class names in CI.

findings.issue: Directory EMPTY — 13 registered perspectives with no runnable code. Swarm is fictional. Violates Law 11: DOCUMENTATION TRUTH and enables Class 3: solo execution.
findings.recommended_fix: Implement agents or remove PERSPECTIVES registration. Truth must match code.

findings.issue: Law 2 (Energy Adaptation) missing from 4 of 5 products — only MindShift implements it. Violates Foundation Law 2 across VOLAURA, Life Simulator, BrandedBy, ZEUS.
findings.recommended_fix: Audit all product UIs for energy mode support. Implement light/medium/heavy focus states per Constitution §LAW 2 within 72h.

findings.issue: Code-index stale — last updated 9 days ago. Agents are simulating without current context. Violates swarm protocol.
findings.recommended_fix: Regenerate code-index immediately and automate daily update via pre-commit hook.

findings.issue: Crystal Law 6 Amendment missing enforcement — badges still triggered as immediate contingent rewards in Life Simulator, violating intrinsic motivation principles.
findings.recommended_fix: Remove badge display post-assessment; shift to surprise drop mechanism per Crystal Law 2.

perspectives.whistleblower_flag: Atlas Gateway decisions being ignored by swarm agents — cross-product consistency collapsing. Immediate swarm re-sync required.

findings.issue: IRT 3PL parameters (a, b, c) are guessed, not calibrated from real data
findings.recommended_fix: Recalibrate parameters using real data to minimize SEM impact

findings.issue: Insufficient question pool size per competency (less than 15 for CAT, less than 30 for reliable theta estimation)
findings.recommended_fix: Increase question pool size to meet minimum requirements

findings.issue: No DIF analysis performed to check for biased questions against AZ/CIS test-takers
findings.recommended_fix: Conduct DIF analysis to ensure fairness

findings.issue: SE threshold may not be appropriate
